from typing import Protocol


class ObjectStorage(Protocol):
    def put_object(self, bucket: str, key: str, body: bytes) -> None: ...
    def get_object(self, bucket: str, key: str) -> dict: ...
    def list_objects_v2(self, bucket: str, prefix: str) -> dict: ...


class DocumentService:
    def __init__(self, storage: ObjectStorage):
        self._storage = storage

    def upload(self, bucket: str, key: str, data: bytes) -> str:
        self._storage.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key, Body=data)
        return f"s3://{bucket}/{key}"

    def download(self, bucket: str, key: str) -> bytes:
        response = self._storage.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key)
        return response["Body"].read()


class ReportGenerator:
    def __init__(self, storage: ObjectStorage):
        self._storage = storage

    def generate(self, report_type: str) -> str:
        data = self._storage.list_objects_v2(Bucket="reports-bucket", Prefix=report_type)
        return f"Generated report with {data.get('KeyCount', 0)} items"
